panels.title: ACTIVE RUN MANAGER (Job history for selected time range)

panels.description:
Lists ALL Run IDs within the selected time range.
- Check the 'Last Seen' column for status.
- If Time = Now: ACTIVE.
- If Time = Past: STOPPED.
panels.title: Job Run ID List (Sorted by Time)

panels.description: Records processed per second. Consistently lower than Input Rate => Warning (backpressure).
panels.title: Processing Rate

panels.description: Batch processing latency. Lower is better.
panels.title: Latency

panels.description: Total state rows currently held in memory.
panels.title: State Rows

panels.description: Important: Green line (Input) should not exceed Yellow line (Processing) for extended periods. If it does => Backpressure detected.
panels.title: Load Balance: Input vs Processing

panels.description: Left axis: Rows. Right axis: Bytes. If both increase continuously => Memory Leak.
panels.title: State Memory Usage

panels.description: Current watermark timestamp. Shows how far the pipeline has processed in event time.
panels.title: Watermark Progress

panels.description: Heap memory monitoring. If Used consistently hits Max => OOM crash risk.
panels.title: JVM Heap Memory Usage

panels.description: GC time (seconds) per second of wall clock. If value > 0.1 (10%), system performance degrades.
panels.title: GC Time (Impact on Latency)

title: Spark Structured Streaming - Kafka Source - JVM Monitoring
